name: rootloom
description: A personal engineering quality layer for Codex: risk-aware, root-cause-driven, and verifiable.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable Codex engineering, woven from the roots up.
interface.longDescription: Rootloom helps an individual developer make Codex choose the right level of care, diagnose the owning cause, keep changes scoped, verify behavior intelligently, and reuse project lessons. Personal Core is single-agent by default and keeps enterprise approval and audit machinery outside the main product.
defaultPrompt: Classify and execute a task with the right Rootloom workflow tier.
Seed and refine AGENTS.md guidance for this repository.
Run a personal engineering change and produce a compact verified summary.
